creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building graphics/libopenraw fails.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
	linking /usr/local/lib/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.55.0 as
	/usr/local/lib/libboost_unit_test_framework-d.so can avoid this problem,
	but it is not sane...
